name: Madison Monroe and Associates
description_short: Florida-based debt settlement, credit repair, and student loan consolidation company claiming $100M+ in settled debt with zero upfront fees and A+ BBB rating since 2009.
description_long:
Madison Monroe & Associates was founded on principles of providing ethical, moral, and honest money-saving solutions to consumers struggling with unsecured debt. The company operates from Florida and markets itself as a full-service debt resolution provider with over a decade of operating history. According to their website, they have completed 13,908 settlements totaling $100,282,239 in debt, resulting in $51,739,753 in claimed client savings.

The company offers three primary services: debt settlement (negotiating lump-sum payoffs with creditors), credit repair (disputing negative items and reestablishing credit profiles), and student loan consolidation (consolidating federal student loans to reduce payment complexity). They claim their debt settlement programs can eliminate debts within 12-18 months while clients pay back 40-60% less of total debt. Their business model charges zero upfront fees, with compensation only after settlements are achieved.

Madison Monroe differentiates itself through several stated commitments: no upfront fees, A+ BBB rating maintained since 2009, 24/7 financial transparency and access, freedom to cancel anytime, and combined 70+ years of experience with credit bureaus and collection agencies. Their marketing emphasizes personal service, professional debt arbitrators, and a customer service team available by phone, email, and text.

Important caveats: The website contains no information about licensing, regulatory oversight, specific settlement terms, typical timelines, hidden fees, or how long credit repair results take. No independent verification of the claimed settlement numbers or savings amounts is provided. The testimonials shown are limited and undated beyond the year. Debt settlement services carry inherent regulatory complexity and consumer risks that are not addressed in the provided content.
pros: No upfront fees—company only profits after settlements are achieved
Maintained A+ BBB rating since 2009, suggesting long-term business stability
Claims 40-60% average debt reduction per client across 13,908+ completed settlements
Offers three integrated services (debt settlement, credit repair, student loans) under one company
24/7 client access to account information and transparency throughout process
Customer service available via multiple channels (phone, email, text)
Client can cancel anytime without penalty if unsatisfied with results
cons: No disclosure of specific fees charged after settlement or percentage of savings retained by company
Website does not specify regulatory licensing, credentials, or compliance framework for debt settlement services
Claims of $100M+ in settlements and $51M+ in savings are unverified and not independently audited
No detailed explanation of how credit repair works or typical timeline to see score improvements
Student loan consolidation details minimal—no information on loan types handled, APR changes, or consolidation mechanics
best_for: Consumers with $5K-$50K+ in unsecured debt (credit cards, personal loans) who can afford monthly deposits into settlement accounts
Florida residents seeking one-stop debt resolution covering settlement, credit repair, and student loans
Borrowers with federal student loans spread across multiple servicers looking to consolidate payments
diagnosis: Madison Monroe & Associates is best for Florida residents with moderate to high unsecured debt who prefer a single provider for debt settlement, credit repair, and student loans, and who value no-upfront-fee models. Critical caveat: debt settlement services carry regulatory complexity and risks (impact on credit during negotiation, potential tax liability on forgiven amounts, collection lawsuits) that are absent from the company's marketing materials; consumers should verify licensing and understand these risks independently before engaging.
services: Debt settlement negotiations with creditors and collection agencies
Lump-sum settlement facilitation for unsecured debts
Credit dispute and negative item removal services
Credit score restoration and repair programs
Ongoing customer support via phone, email, and text
Harassment and collection call cessation assistance
